heading: Requirements
body:
To use this operator, you must:

- Index the ancestor fields as the [embeddedDocuments](bson-data-types-embedded-documents) type. In the query, specify
  `ancestorPath` as this field. If the field is on the root level, use
  [hasRoot Operator](has-root-ref).

- Specify [returnScope](fts-return-scope) to set the scope of the
  document to query and retrieve.
